name: ポイ活コンビニゲーム：買い物ソートパズルでポイントを稼ごう！

detail.description:
Aim to be a convenience store master with “Poi Katsu Convenience Store Game”! !

This is a 3D product sorting puzzle set in a Japanese store called ``Convenience Store'' where you have to collect 3 of the same items scattered on the shelves and put them away.

▼Features of the app
A simple point game app where you can play 3D sorting puzzles for free!
You can earn Rakuten points and purchase your favorite products!
Unlimited number of stages! Use useful items when times are difficult.
